brand_dna.category: Organic yaupon holly tea - America's only native caffeinated plant, positioned as a smoother, homegrown alternative to coffee, tea, and energy drinks.
brand_dna.core_belief: A caffeinated drink can taste good, be good for you, and be good for the planet - 'Discovering a drink without compromise.'
proof_points: 100% American-grown, sourced from family farms across the South
Just one ingredient - no additives; naturally contains caffeine, theobromine, and theacrine
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, mission-driven functional beverage - cleaner and calmer than coffee/energy drinks, more sustainable and homegrown than imported tea.

voice_pillars.name: Calm & Grounded
voice_pillars.desc: Sells energy as steady and settled, not hyped - always framing the calm side of caffeine.
voice_pillars.quote: sustained energy without spikes or crashes

voice_pillars.name: Rooted & Homegrown
voice_pillars.desc: Leans hard on American origin and native heritage as the reason to buy.
voice_pillars.quote: From America's Only Caffeinated Plant: YAUPON HOLLY

voice_pillars.name: Purpose-Led
voice_pillars.desc: Ties every product back to biodiversity, ecosystems, and equitable agriculture.
voice_pillars.quote: Light on you, light on the planet

voice_pillars.name: Warm & Sensory
voice_pillars.desc: Describes flavor with rich, tactile tasting notes that make the cup feel inviting.
voice_pillars.quote: a dark, smoky center and a comforting finish

phrases: sustained energy without spikes or crashes
easier digestion than coffee or tea
The smoothest way to stay sharp
Three flavors to suit every mood

icp: Health-conscious coffee and tea drinkers who want steady energy without jitters or crashes, care about clean single-ingredient products, and like supporting American family farms and sustainable brands.

personas.name: Crash-Averse Coffee Drinker
personas.description: A heavy coffee or energy-drink user whose stomach and nerves can't take the acidity - moved by 'lighter on your stomach' and 'no spikes or crashes.'

personas.name: Buy-American Believer
personas.description: A conscious shopper who prefers homegrown over imported and values small farms - moved by '100% American-Grown' and native-plant heritage.

personas.name: Curious Tea Explorer
personas.description: An adventurous tea lover always hunting new blends and flavors - moved by the three-roast tasting notes and the Variety Bundle.

products_ladder.title: Goldholly Variety Bundle • Original, Bold, and Mellow • Organic Yaupon Tea
Mellow Organic Yaupon Tea • Malted & Earthy
Original Organic Yaupon Tea • Bright & Crisp
Bold Organic Yaupon Tea • Rich & Toasted

offers: Subscription / recurring purchase option at checkout
Email signup for offers, recipes, and updates

allowed.claim: Low in teeth-staining tannins for a smoother, less bitter sip
Just one ingredient, with no additives
100% American-grown, sourced from family farms across the South
About 30mg of caffeine per teabag - roughly half of green or black tea

banned.why: Unqualified immunity claim is banned for this category.
Unqualified 'detox' is banned as a vague, unsupported health claim.

banned.claim: Burns fat or aids weight loss
banned.why: Fat-burning / weight-loss claims are banned without substantiation.

banned.claim: Treats, cures, or prevents anxiety, insomnia, or any disease
banned.why: Disease-treatment claims are prohibited for food and beverage.

banned.claim: Headlining 'clean' or 'natural' as a standalone health promise
banned.why: 'Natural' and 'clean' are vague and risky as headline claims - keep them descriptive, not as benefit claims.

banned.claim: Any nutrient-content claim (e.g. 'sugar-free', 'high antioxidant') not matching the actual label
banned.why: Nutrient-content claims must match the verified product label.
